title: OntogonyHeaderPropagation
description: Frozen set of HTTP headers propagated on Ontogony service-to-service integration calls.

frozenRequired.description: Exact frozen set of seven headers that MUST be propagated. Matches OntogonyPropagationHeaderContract.FrozenRequired.

canonicalAliases.description: Preferred aliases for new integrations (superset of frozenRequired).

legacyInteropAliases.description: Accepted inbound-only aliases; must not appear on outbound calls.
